latest_notes.message: No validation commands have been executed yet. Do not mark any gate as pass until command output or review evidence exists.

Auth-focused validation was executed: pnpm prisma:validate passed, focused authz/webhook Vitest files passed, pnpm typecheck and full pnpm test failed on existing scaffold gaps outside this task. pnpm validate:contracts failed because scripts/validate-contracts.mjs is missing.

Setup-gate focused validation was executed: pnpm test tests/unit/setup/status.test.ts tests/unit/schemas/setup.schemas.test.ts passed. pnpm typecheck and full pnpm test still fail on repo-wide scaffold gaps outside this task.

Phase 0 validation restoration completed: added scripts/validate-contracts.mjs, aligned PaymentRecord.lastErrorMessage, corrected Prisma client output/shadow DB config, fixed typecheck blockers, regenerated Prisma, and ran validation. pnpm lint still fails on existing scaffold/sample-code issues.
Phase 2-4 backend payment work: pnpm typecheck passed. Full lint/test/prisma/contracts were not re-run after these edits by instruction to conserve tokens and prioritize production code.

Backend gap pass completed: notification dispatch/provider/templates, admin retry persistence, env/cache helpers, route shell fetcher/action wiring. Stripe sandbox E2E was not run and remains required before production launch.

Stripe Connect correction: target account acct_1TQHH2GuFcEUvSe9 was confirmed through Stripe CLI/MCP, local/Vercel/GitHub env names were aligned to STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, a webhook destination was created, and code was changed toward Accounts v2 plus destination charges with application fees. New validation must be run.

Validation after Stripe Connect correction passed: typecheck, Prisma validate, contract validate, lint, unit tests, local production build, and Vercel production deployment dpl_A8xvkimPibpFKEDDserNSTjNzDf3. Stripe CLI confirmed acct_1TQHH2GuFcEUvSe9 and webhook endpoint we_1TRiYtGuFcEUvSe9y6ivVvLs at https://usevouch.vercel.app/api/webhooks/stripe.

Backend/route matrix follow-up removed remaining SCAFFOLD_NOT_IMPLEMENTED markers from app/features/lib/schemas/types surfaces. pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm prisma:validate, and pnpm validate:contracts passed. E2E and Stripe sandbox lifecycle remain not run.

Clerk auth overhaul validation passed: pnpm prisma:validate, pnpm prisma:generate, pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, pnpm test -- auth, and pnpm test -- webhook. Clerk webhook processing now uses svix-id as the ProviderWebhookEvent idempotency key and persists safe projections for required user/session/email/SMS/auth-provider invitation events.

Environment and migration cleanup passed: pnpm prisma:validate, pnpm build, pnpm prisma migrate dev --name init, pnpm prisma migrate status, and pnpm validate:contracts. Prisma now loads .env then .env.local with local override, Clerk webhook verification requires CLERK_WEBHOOK_SECRET, and the initial migration was applied.
